pattern: Converting clock times to minutes and sorting reduces the answer to the smallest gap between neighbors, including the wrap-around across midnight.
hints: Map each HH:MM to total minutes past midnight so comparisons become arithmetic.
Sort the minute values; the closest pair must be adjacent in sorted order.

Check every adjacent difference plus the wrap-around gap of the first time plus 1440 minus the last, and if more than 1440 distinct-minute values exist there must be a duplicate so the answer is zero.

stress.description: distinct random times to exercise sorting and wrap-around
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(1439, max(2, size))
    minutes = rng.sample(range(1440), n)
    pts = ['%02d:%02d' % (m // 60, m % 60) for m in minutes]
    return [pts]
